name: @armyc2.c5isr.renderer/mil-sym-ts
description: MIL-STD-2525 D/E symbol rendering TypeScript library

scripts.pack: copy package.packNode.json dist\package.json && copy README.md dist\README.md && copy LICENSE dist\LICENSE && cd dist && del index.* && del tsconfig.tsbuildinfo && rd /s /q src && npm pack
scripts.buildNode: npm run clean & npm run build && npm run bundleWPN && npm run bundleDTS && npm run pack

author: C5ISR ESI
